## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_governance_repo.py`

## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Policy/Directive intent is clear
- [ ] Control and traceability impact is clear
- [ ] Downstream impact is clear
- [ ] Release documentation is sufficient
